title: It's Cobblin' Time: Reborn
description: Capture Pokémon, prove your strength in battles, and create incredible builds with your friends.
body:
The official modpack for the It's Cobblin' Time: Reborn Cobblemon server a community-driven continuation of the original server, rebuilt with improvements and thoughtful tweaks.

This modpack is designed to let players capture every Pokémon while having fun, build beautiful creations, design efficient automatic farms, and take part in regular in-game events.
Whether you're a trainer, a builder, or an automation enthusiast, the goal is simple: play your way and enjoy the full Cobblemon experience.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

mains mods : 

Our Core Features:
- Cobblemon: (Adds in vanilla-style Pokémon into Minecraft to battle, catch and befriend) 
- Cobblemon Addons: (Mega Showdown, Fight or Flight, Cobbreeding, Cobblecuisine, SimpleTMs, Bottlecaps, Cobbleworkers, Pokénavs and many more)
- Decoration/Furniture mods: (Handcrafted, Supplementaries, CobbleFurnies, Diagonal Glass, Fences and Walls, Chipped)
- Farmer's Delight + addons (Flora's Delight)
- Storage mods: (Sophisticated Storage + Sophisticated Backpacks for on the go storage)   
- Waystones: (Wraith Waystones)   
- Sleeping bags: (Comforts) 
- Exploration mods: (Terralith, William Wythers' Overhauled Overworld, Dungeons N Taverns, Xaero's Minimap + E19 Cobblemon Icons)   
- QOL and aesthetic mods: (Jade, EMI, Lootr, Veinminer, Nature's Compass, Elytra Slot, AppleSkin, NotEnoughAnimations, Fast Leaf Decay, Mouse Tweaks, Simple Voice Chat and many more)
- Mega Evolution is coming soon! Prove your strength in a fierce Elite Four battle to earn the Mega Bracelet, then dive into Raid Dens to collect Mega Gems.
